examples: What is the use of a book about interior design without a plenitude of pictures in colour?
The music brought him a feeling of plenitude and freedom.
God is the plenitude of heaven; love is the plenitude of man.
Simmons (interviewed, but excluded from the article) insisted plenitude was a mirage and prices were set to soar.
Here is all the plenitude and warmth and the triviality and sadness of Los Angeles life.
